summary: BTC Tools | Multicast Mapping | Search for Created Mapping
gherkin:
When the user clicks the "Multicast Mapping" option on the top nav
And the user enters "Test Call sign" in the search field
Then the user is navigated to the Multicast Mapping page
And the search results are filtered
And the Results include the multicast mapping with call sign "Test Call sign"
